Enquiry
The region

About Zadar

One of the most beautiful cities on the Dalmatian coast – and an ideal place for your own piece of the Adriatic.

Zadar lies at the heart of Croatia’s Adriatic coast, roughly halfway between Rijeka and Split. The city combines a millennia-old old town on a narrow peninsula with a modern, year-round lively setting – and one of the Mediterranean’s most beautiful island archipelagos right on its doorstep.

Location & access

Zadar Airport is about 15 minutes away and served by direct flights from many German-speaking cities. Via the A1 motorway, Zadar is also well connected by car. That makes the region especially attractive for owners who want to use their property themselves and rent it out at the same time.

Old town & sea

The historic old town with its Roman forum, the Church of St Donatus, the famous Sea Organ and the “Greeting to the Sun” draws visitors all year. Around the city are seaside promenades, marinas and restaurants – and Zadar’s sunsets are legendary.

The islands

Just offshore lie Ugljan and Pašman, only a short crossing away. A little further out beckon Dugi Otok with the dream beach of Sakarun and the Telaščica nature park, as well as the Kornati archipelago. Many of the finest holiday properties are located right there – and are quickest to reach by boat.

Why own property here

A mild climate, clear water, good connections and steady demand for holiday accommodation make Zadar one of the most sought-after locations on the Adriatic. For a property to be a joy rather than a worry, you need someone on the ground who takes care of it – that’s our job.

📍 Zadar

Your property in this region?

We know Zadar and the islands – and look after them all year round.
